payload.title: Apple price increases for MacBook Pro and iPad Air
payload.fact: Apple increased the price of the 16-inch MacBook Pro by $300.
supporting_evidence: The 16-inch MacBook Pro saw its price go up by $300

payload.title: Apple price increases for MacBook Pro and iPad Air
payload.fact: Apple increased the price of the 11-inch iPad Air from $599 to $749.
supporting_evidence: The 11-inch iPad Air went from $599 to $749

payload.title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 model partially restored
payload.fact: Anthropic's Mythos 5 model was restored for a select group of organizations after a two-week negotiation with the Trump administration.
supporting_evidence: Anthropic's Mythos 5 is finally back in action - at least, somewhat, for a select group of organizations
After a rollercoaster negotiation process with the Trump administration that dragged on for two weeks

payload.title: Anthropic's Mythos-class public model remains unavailable
payload.fact: Anthropic's public-facing Mythos-class model, Fable 5, remains unavailable with no timeline for rollout.
supporting_evidence: Fable 5, however - the public-facing Mythos-class model - appears to still be in limbo, with no apparent timeline for a rollout agreement

payload.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 model suite
payload.fact: OpenAI unveiled a limited preview of its GPT-5.6 model suite including Sol, Terra, and Luna models.
supporting_evidence: On Friday, the company unveiled the limited preview of its new GPT 5.6 model suite: Sol, the flagship; Terra, a medium-tier model for "high-volume work"; and Luna, a "fast and affordable" everyday model

payload.title: OpenAI delays GPT-5.6 release after government request
payload.fact: OpenAI delayed the full release of GPT-5.6 and agreed to stagger its rollout at the request of the Trump administration.
supporting_evidence: The Trump administration ... has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees ... it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form ... in compliance with a request from the federal government

payload.title: Ford rehired former engineers to fix automated system errors
payload.fact: Ford rehired former engineers and technicians to correct errors made by its automated production and design systems.
supporting_evidence: Ford ... required ... hiring experienced technicians - sometimes bringing back former employees - to correct errors made by the company's robots

payload.title: Meta relaunches Facebook Creator Studio as AI companion app
payload.fact: Meta relaunched the Facebook Creator Studio page manager as a standalone AI companion app.
supporting_evidence: Meta is bringing back the Facebook Creator Studio page manager, now "reimagined" as a standalone AI companion app

payload.title: Congresswoman denies AI use in drafting legislation
payload.fact: Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna stated her staff only used AI for spellcheck in an amendment summary and denied AI was used to draft the bill text.
supporting_evidence: Anna Paulina Luna ... says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary ... but denies it was used for the bill text itself
"NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI"
